caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and glasses. He wears a large, silver-grey faux-hair piece and over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photos and clothing racks displaying various garments. To the left and right of the man, logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appear on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the first frame, he looks straight ahead; in the second, he begins to move his right hand; in the third, he looks slightly downward while gesturing; and in the final frame, he is speaking while looking toward the side. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene.
